sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88417" key="pro/pustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρόπυστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n88417.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having learnt before,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.105B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.105B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
